description: Product Description Arroworthy 9" 9/16 Nap Microfiber Roller Sleeve Arroworthy Classic Microfiber Roller Sleeve Length: 9" / Nap: 9/16" For a fine finish on smooth and semi-smooth surfaces Use with oil and water-based paints Shed resistant Catering to the needs of professional painters and serious DIYers Arroworthy is a trusted name in the painting industry, known for producing high-quality painting tools and accessories. With decades of experience, Arroworthy combines innovation, craftsmanship, and reliability to deliver products that professionals trust. Arroworthy 9” 9/16 NAP Microfiber Roller Sleeve MicroFiber Roller Covers maximum paint pick-up High solvent-resistant core (SRC) Designed for maximum paint pick-up European Microfiber Rollers are designed for Today's Paint & Stains. Superior Pick Up & Finish Good for all paints and stains, especially new low-VOC coatings Made in U.S.A. Arroworthy 9” 9/16 NAP Excellent Performance Polypropylene Core Perfect for Stains Acrylic Low sheen Enamels Finishes Our Story Conscious products for sustainable painting solutions! Arroworthy , a renowned name in the painting industry, has a rich legacy rooted in craftsmanship and innovation. Established over three decades ago, the company began as a small family-owned business dedicated to producing high-quality paintbrushes. With a commitment to excellence, Arroworthy quickly gained a reputation for its superior products, known for their durability and performance. Over the years, the company expanded its product line to include a wide range of painting tools, from rollers to accessories, all designed to meet the diverse needs of professional painters and DIY enthusiasts alike. Arroworth y's dedication to continuous improvement has driven its growth, allowing it to become a trusted brand in North America and beyond. Today, Arroworthy stands as a symbol of quality and reliability in the painting industry, continuing to innovate and set standards with its exceptional products that help users achieve flawless finishes. Professional painters and contractors consistently praise the MicroFiber Rollers line for its reliability and performance: "The best rollers I've used in my 20 years of painting." "Superior quality and durability – a must-have for any serious painter." "Excellent control and smooth application every time."
